prompt: Create a tall vertical inspirational art wallpaper in a quiet Monument Valley–inspired isometric style, soft healing pastel palette, and lots of misty negative space. The scene is an impossible architectural city made of pale peach, lavender, cream, and powder-blue stone: high narrow towers, arched doorways, bridges, staircases, parapets, and floating platforms arranged around a deep dark vertical abyss in the center. Include exactly one tiny lone human figure standing on an upper bridge, wearing a purple cloak or dress and white head, looking into the abyss. Add one prominent building face near the middle-right with a glowing circular portal like a warm orange-pink eclipse, casting light into the deep shaft. Add exactly two small bare ornamental trees in square planters, one on the lower-left terrace and one on the right terrace. The architecture should include multiple surreal stairways, including one long diagonal staircase in the lower center-left and one stepped staircase climbing the upper-right tower; the tallest tower has a turquoise domed roof and a small spire. Use a pale sun disk near the upper left, atmospheric fog, soft bloom, delicate shadows, and minimal linework. Place large vertical Chinese quote typography on the upper-left in thin elegant gray strokes: 当你凝视深渊时，深渊也在凝视你。. Beneath it, add a small English translation in light gray: When you gaze into the abyss, the abyss gazes into you.. Add small editorial poster details: top-left text VOL.01 with a tiny horizontal line below it, top-right text 2026 with exactly four small vertical dots below, a small left-side keyword block reading “depth” and “gaze,” a bottom-left minimalist circle logo above the words “LOOK DEEP” and “BE SEEN,” and exactly three small horizontal dots at the bottom-right. Keep the overall composition airy, refined, contemplative, and premium, with the quote occupying the left third and the surreal city rising through the center and right.
